promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor began offering franchises June 2018 (not just 'formed 2016')
Franchisee sales compiled from franchisee-reported data (self-reported, not independently verified)
5 company-owned units (DD, GG, JJ, KK, MM) were purchased from franchisees during 2024 — blended operation periods in reported sales
No franchise sales occurred in fiscal years 2023 or 2024
ERI received $306,594.43 in rebates from approved suppliers in 2024, all contributed to BPF or conference
BPF 2024 spending: 30.22% media, 20.28% admin, 16.92% sponsorships, 15.8% local marketing, 10.42% retained, 4.56% social/eMarketing, 1.36% website, 0.44% gift card. 0% franchisee solicitation.
Washington state explicitly flagged financial condition risk and imposed fee deferral requirement
Washington no-poach AOD entered October 11, 2019 (Case No. 19-2-26768-2 SEA)
57% of advertising revenue in 2024 came from Parent Company-owned locations (up from 48%)
Uninsured deposits of $601,700 as of Dec 29, 2024 — exceeds FDIC limits
